sepsis.updateMode: Longitudinal monitoring with graph re-ranking after each newly normalized bedside update.

layers.title: Patient twin engine
layers.role: Digital-patient style graph backbone for patient-state representation and endpoint-aware disease-state tracking.
layers.note: This is the closest layer to a real digital twin: it owns the evolving patient state and update loop.

layers.title: Mechanism and prioritization layer
layers.role: Combines TxGNN candidate ranking, MetaXcan / PrediXcan evidence, and DRKG-style graph context.
layers.note: This layer turns the current disease-state snapshot into ranked host-directed and adjunctive hypotheses.

layers.title: ICU-style update loop
layers.role: Future time-updating layer inspired by DT-ICU for continuous severity refresh as new labs and support variables arrive.
layers.note: Planned for a later version where patient state changes over time rather than only per submitted case.

candidemia.updateMode: Source-control, host-response, and treatment-context monitoring with iterative reprioritization after each case update.

layers.title: Patient twin engine
layers.role: Digital-patient style backbone for evolving disease state, host risk, and treatment trajectory context.
layers.note: Frames candidemia as a living state model rather than a one-shot classifier.

layers.title: Mechanism and prioritization layer
layers.role: Ranks exploratory candidates using TxGNN plus imported MetaXcan / PrediXcan and DRKG-style mechanistic support.
layers.note: Adds host-defense, endothelial stress, and fungal response support to the ranking surface.

layers.title: Molecular structure overlay
layers.role: Future FungAMR-style protein structure annotations for mapped genes and resistance or hotspot visualization.
layers.note: Planned export/import path for tertiary-structure overlays and residue-level interpretation.
